/Users/marius/Dev/cmake-3.28.1/CMake.app/Contents/bin/cmake -E rm -f CMakeFiles/vrr_flicker_test.dir/objects.a
/opt/homebrew/bin/i686-w64-mingw32-ar qc CMakeFiles/vrr_flicker_test.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles/vrr_flicker_test.dir/objects1.rsp
/opt/homebrew/bin/i686-w64-mingw32-g++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -static -static-libgcc -static-libstdc++ -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles/vrr_flicker_test.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o /Volumes/Media/Dev/Projects/project__vrr-flicker/vrr_flicker_test.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libvrr_flicker_test.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles/vrr_flicker_test.dir/linkLibs.rsp
